# 11startups.tech

> AI consulting that delivers real results. From strategy to production-ready solutions.

## About

11startups.tech is an AI consulting company helping startups and enterprises integrate cutting-edge artificial intelligence into their workflows. We offer end-to-end services — from strategy and prototyping to deployment, compliance, and ongoing support — with measurable ROI.

## Services

- **AI Strategy Consulting**: Audit operations, identify high-impact AI use cases, and build a prioritised implementation roadmap.
- **Rapid Prototyping**: Go from concept to working AI prototype in 2–4 weeks. Validate ideas fast with minimal investment.
- **Workflow Automation**: Deploy intelligent AI agents that learn your processes and handle repetitive tasks like document processing and customer routing.
- **Data Analytics & Insights**: Advanced ML pipelines and dashboards that surface hidden patterns for data-driven decision-making.
- **AI Safety & Compliance**: Governance frameworks, bias auditing, and regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, etc.) for enterprise AI deployment.
- **Ongoing Support & Optimisation**: Dedicated AI engineers monitor, fine-tune, and scale solutions post-launch.

## Features

### Core Capabilities
- AI Strategy Consulting
- Rapid Prototyping (2–4 week turnaround)
- Workflow Automation with intelligent agents
- Data Analytics & ML-powered insights
- AI Safety & Compliance auditing
- Ongoing support with dedicated engineers

### Platform Capabilities
- Multi-Cloud Deployment (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- Modular Architecture — plug-and-play AI modules
- Enterprise-Grade Security (end-to-end encryption, SOC 2)
- Real-Time Monitoring (accuracy, latency, drift)
- Custom AI Agents (support bots, data extractors)
- Continuous Learning (automatic model retraining)

## Pricing

- **Starter** ($499/month): AI readiness assessment, 1 consultation/month, email support, basic workflow analysis, implementation roadmap.
- **Business** ($1,499/month): Everything in Starter plus 4 consultations/month, custom AI model prototyping, priority support, dedicated AI engineer, monthly performance reports.
- **Enterprise** ($3,999/month): Everything in Business plus unlimited consultations, on-site workshops, AI safety & compliance audit, custom model training, 24/7 dedicated support.

## Process

1. **Discovery**: Deep-dive into business, data, and goals to pinpoint highest-value AI opportunities.
2. **Design**: Architect a tailored solution — models, data pipelines, and integration points.
3. **Build**: Develop, test, and iterate with weekly demos and feedback cycles.
4. **Deploy & Scale**: Launch to production with monitoring, support, and scaling plans.
